resources.string: { \"schema_version\": 2, \"profile\": \"DETAIL_ACTIVE\", \"sender\": { \"max_width\": 1920, \"max_height\": 1080, \"max_fps\": 15, \"content_mode\": \"TEXT\", \"min_bitrate_bps\": 400000, \"start_bitrate_bps\": 3000000, \"max_bitrate_bps\": 5000000, \"degradation_preference\": \"MAINTAIN_RESOLUTION\", \"network_priority\": \"HIGH\" }, \"transport\": { \"disable_tcp_candidates\": true, \"screencast_min_bitrate_bps\": 400000 }, \"pacing\": { \"screenshare_alr_probing\": true, \"factor\": 1.1, \"max_queue_ms\": 100 }, \"encoder\": { \"hardware_policy\": \"PREFER_HARDWARE\", \"realtime\": true, \"allow_frame_reordering\": false, \"h264_profile\": \"CONSTRAINED_BASELINE\", \"h264_level\": \"4.1\", \"max_frame_delay_count\": 1, \"max_qp\": 32, \"video_toolbox_low_latency_rate_control\": false }, \"receiver\": { \"jitter_minimum_ms\": 0, \"prerender_smoothing\": false, \"render_lead_ms\": 10, \"android_decoder_low_latency\": true, \"stale_decoded_frame_ms\": 150 }, \"recovery\": { \"nack_enabled\": true, \"nack_history_ms\": 1000, \"rtx_enabled\": true, \"fec_mode\": \"DISABLED\", \"pli_min_interval_ms\": 300, \"no_decoded_frame_timeout_ms\": 150, \"decoder_recreate_after_failed_pli\": 2, \"sender_reset_after_failed_pli\": 3 }, \"telemetry\": { \"sample_interval_ms\": 1000 } }
